q1.q: Is there a free trial? Do I need a credit card?
q1.a: Yes — every plan comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime.

q2.a: WhatsApp, Telegram, Basalam, Digikala, and Bale. More integrations are added regularly based on customer demand.

q3.q: How does the AI assistant work?
q3.a: The AI reads incoming messages, detects intent (pricing, shipping, returns, etc.), and sends pre-configured replies automatically. You control what it says and when.

q4.q: Can multiple team members use the same account?
q4.a: Yes. All plans support multiple users with role-based access. Invite your team, assign conversations, and track performance together.

q5.a: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell or share your data with third parties.

q6.q: Can I change my plan later?
q6.a: Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade at any time from Settings → Billing. Changes take effect immediately.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for the Kalahamoon Browser Extension

intro.title: Scope
intro.content: This Privacy Policy explains how the Kalahamoon Browser Extension collects, uses, and protects information when you install or use the extension on supported websites. It applies specifically to the extension and its related Kalahamoon services used to authenticate your account, process product captures, and deliver requested features.

collect.title: Information We Access
collect.content: The extension may access the active page, selected product links, page content, images, prices, product descriptions, variants, and technical page signals required to identify supported marketplaces and extract product information at your request. If you sign in, Kalahamoon also stores account and session data needed to keep the extension connected to your workspace.

use.title: How We Use Information
use.content: We use this information only to provide extension features such as detecting supported stores, extracting product data, checking duplicate captures, sending products to destinations you configure, generating affiliate links where available, and maintaining account access, security, and operational reliability. We do not use captured product data for advertising or unrelated profiling.

sharing.title: How Information Is Shared
sharing.content: We do not sell personal information. Information is shared only when necessary to operate the extension, such as with Kalahamoon backend services, destination platforms you explicitly connect or choose for product export, and service providers that support secure hosting and delivery of the service.

security.title: Permissions and Security
security.content: The extension requests browser permissions such as active tab access, supported site access, storage, context menus, notifications, scripting, clipboard write, tabs, identity, and alarms solely to enable its documented features. We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards, including authenticated access controls and encrypted network transmission where supported, to help protect stored and transmitted data.

rights.title: Your Choices and Rights
rights.content: You can stop collection by disabling or uninstalling the extension at any time. You can also disconnect your Kalahamoon account, remove stored browser data through your browser settings, and contact us to request access, correction, or deletion of personal information associated with your account, subject to legal and operational requirements.

contact.title: Data We Do Not Intentionally Collect and Contact
contact.content: The extension is not designed to collect unrelated personal messages, passwords, payment card details, or private form input unless that information is part of product content you intentionally ask the extension to process on a supported page. If you have questions, requests, or concerns about this policy, contact us at support@kalahamoon.com or through https://kalahamoon.com.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Kalahamoon, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Kalahamoon provides an AI-powered CRM platform for sales teams, including unified messaging, pipeline management, and automation tools.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. You must provide accurate information and keep your credentials confidential.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use our platform in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. You may not use the service for any unlawful purpose.

payment.title: Billing & Payments
payment.content: Paid plans are billed according to the pricing displayed at the time of purchase. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may cancel your account at any time.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Kalahamoon is provided on an "as is" basis. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.

q1.q: How do I connect my WhatsApp?
q1.a: Go to Settings > Integrations > WhatsApp and follow the setup wizard to connect your WhatsApp Business account.

q2.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from Settings > Billing.

q3.q: How does the AI assistant work?
q3.a: The AI assistant automatically responds to customer messages based on your knowledge base and configured rules.

pricingPage.title: Enterprise pricing for sales teams
pricingPage.descriptionLead: Start with a {days}-day trial, then choose Starter, Growth, or Pro from the billing page after login.
pricingPage.descriptionTail: All paid plans include multilingual support and role-based permissions.
pricingPage.contactLeadIn: Need rollout help or a custom commercial agreement? Contact

extensionPage.title: Install Kalahamoon from the Chrome Web Store
extensionPage.description: Install the extension, sign in to the Kalahamoon panel, connect WooCommerce, then capture a supported product page and send it to your store after review.
extensionPage.releaseNote: New: TileIran's HikaShop catalog is supported with the same review-before-send workflow.
extensionPage.storeHint: Use the published Chrome Web Store listing for normal installation. Chrome manages updates after each new version is published.
extensionPage.visualSubtitle: Right-click a product, review the extraction, then push it to your commerce stack.
extensionPage.installLead: Install from the Chrome Web Store first. Store credentials and connections are configured in the Kalahamoon panel, not inside the extension.
extensionPage.storePointInstall: One-click installation from the Chrome Web Store, without asking users to enable Developer mode.
extensionPage.storePointUpdates: Chrome handles updates after a new version is published to the listing.
extensionPage.storePointFallback: Manual packages are reserved for internal testing and emergency support only.
extensionPage.workflowTitle: Connect your store and import a product
extensionPage.workflowLead: Follow these four steps for the WooCommerce flow. The extension sends the reviewed product to the store connected in your Kalahamoon panel.

signIn.title: Sign in to Kalahamoon
signIn.description: Create your workspace or sign in to the Kalahamoon panel with the same account you will use in the extension.

connectWooCommerce.title: Connect WooCommerce
connectWooCommerce.description: Open WooCommerce settings in the panel and add your store URL plus WooCommerce API credentials. Test the connection before importing products.

captureProduct.title: Open a supported product page
captureProduct.description: Visit one product page on a supported source website, then open the Kalahamoon extension from the Chrome toolbar.

sendProduct.title: Review and send
sendProduct.description: Choose WooCommerce, review the title, price, images, and stock, then send the product to the connected store.

features.capture: Capture product data from supported marketplace pages without copy-pasting.
features.review: Open a clean review screen before pushing any product into another channel.
features.route: Send products to WooCommerce, Shopify, Basalam API, or clipboard output.
features.control: Keep destinations disabled until their credentials are configured correctly.

priceRefresh.q: Will my WooCommerce price update when the source price changes?
priceRefresh.a: For verified supported source pages such as Shoudermarket and Tileiran, source-controlled price sync checks hourly after import. It updates only when a valid positive source price is available and price sync remains enabled.

safe.q: Can this page remove Chrome's Enhanced Safe Browsing trust notice?
safe.a: No. That notice is controlled by Chrome and the Chrome Web Store trust system, not by this landing page. Keep the listing accurate, minimize permissions over time, and publish updates through the store.

update.a: Chrome updates store installs after a new version is published. Users do not need to replace folders or reload unpacked extensions.

where.q: Where should I install the extension?
where.a: Use the official Chrome Web Store listing for normal installation. Internal test packages are used only when support asks you to use one.

wordpressPluginPage.integrationDescription: Connect your WordPress site to Kalahamoon using an API key. The WordPress plugin lets you display products, manage affiliate links, and capture leads directly from your site.

wordpressPluginPage.step1Title: Download and install the Kalahamoon plugin
wordpressPluginPage.step1Description: Upload the Kalahamoon plugin ZIP file to your WordPress site via Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin.
wordpressPluginPage.step2Description: Go to WordPress Admin → Kalahamoon → Settings.
wordpressPluginPage.step3Description: Generate an API key above and paste it into the "API Key" field in the plugin settings.
wordpressPluginPage.step5Description: Click "Test Connection" in the plugin settings to verify everything is working.
wordpressPluginPage.step6Description: Click "Sync Products Now" to import your product catalog into WordPress.

permissions.viewProductInfo: View public and non-public product information such as name, product photos, descriptions, view counts, and product sales
permissions.editProductInfo: View and edit public and non-public product information such as name, product photos, descriptions, view counts, and product sales
permissions.viewPurchases: View all user purchases on Basalam
permissions.editPurchases: View all user purchases on Basalam and make changes such as cancelling orders or reporting problems
permissions.viewBoothOrders: View information of all booth orders
permissions.editBoothOrders: View information of all booth orders and edit them such as confirming order, registering shipment, delay agreement, refund, and cancellation
permissions.viewWallet: View full information of the user's wallet on Basalam
permissions.editWallet: View full information of the user's wallet on Basalam and perform recharge and credit payment
permissions.viewConversations: View full user conversations on Basalam

mixin.title: Mixin
mixin.description: Connect your Mixin store for inbound sync, product publishing, and outbound product updates.
mixin.capabilityTitlePartial: Product sync complete, order write-back pending
mixin.capabilityDescriptionFull: Mixin supports inbound sync, product publishing, outbound product sync, and remote order updates.
mixin.capabilityDescriptionPartial: Mixin now supports inbound sync, product publishing, and outbound product updates. Remote order status and tracking write-back are still unavailable.
mixin.readOnlyDescription: Only organization owners and admins can manage the Mixin integration.
mixin.connectionHint: Add your store URL and API key to connect Mixin.
mixin.apiKeyPlaceholderSaved: Leave empty to keep the current API key
mixin.whatThisSyncDoesDescription: Mixin is connected to the shared marketplace core and now supports both inbound and outbound product workflows.
mixin.featureImportProducts: Imports products into marketplace listings with platform MIXIN
mixin.featureImportOrders: Imports orders with source MIXIN and links order items when possible
mixin.featurePublishProducts: Publishes internal catalog products to Mixin as new listings
mixin.featureManualSync: Pushes price, inventory, and publication status back to captured Mixin listings
mixin.featureOrderWriteback: Order status and tracking still update locally only until Mixin write-back endpoints are verified

digikala.title: Digikala Integration
digikala.description: Connect your Digikala seller account to manage orders and products.
digikala.connectDescription: Connect your Digikala seller account to start
digikala.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect Digikala? This will stop syncing orders and products.
digikala.connectAdminOnly: Only organization owners and admins can connect Digikala.
digikala.infoDescription: Digikala is Iran's largest e-commerce platform. Integrating it allows you to:
digikala.feature1: Sync orders automatically to your CRM
digikala.feature2: Manage products and inventory from one place
digikala.feature4: Update stock and prices in real-time
digikala.sellerOwnedCredentialsNotice: Each seller must connect their own Digikala seller account, token, webhook secret, and panel settings. Kalahamoon never uses a shared platform seller account for tenant data.
digikala.webhookHttpsWarning: Digikala requires an HTTPS webhook URL.
digikala.webhookIpWarning: Set DIGIKALA_WEBHOOK_IP or SERVER_PUBLIC_IP to show the server IP users must enter in Digikala.
digikala.webhookSecretPlaceholder: Paste the webhook secret from Digikala
digikala.webhookSecretSavedPlaceholder: Secret saved. Leave empty to keep it unchanged.
digikala.webhookSecretHelp: Use the same secret configured in the Digikala webhook panel so incoming events can be verified.
digikala.webhookManualStep: In Digikala, enter the URL and IP above, then enable these events. This button also attempts to subscribe the event types through the Open API when your token permits it.
digikala.webhookApiCheckPassed: Open API webhook event types are readable with this seller token.
digikala.webhookApiCheckPending: Webhook event types could not be read yet. Manual panel setup may still be required.
digikala.webhookSaveSuccess: Webhook settings saved and event subscription checked.
digikala.sellerAccountRequiredDescription: The connected token must belong to the final seller who owns the Digikala products and orders. If another shop uses this CRM, they should connect their own seller account, not Kalahamoon's or another tenant's account.
digikala.networkError: Failed to sync due to a network error.
digikala.loadFailedTitle: Digikala settings could not be loaded
digikala.readOnlyDescription: Only organization owners and admins can update Digikala settings.
digikala.manageAdminOnly: Only organization owners and admins can test, sync, or disconnect Digikala.
digikala.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
digikala.failedToConnect: Failed to connect to the server.
digikala.apiKeyInstruction: To link Digikala, paste either your Seller access token or the exclusive token from Service Hub.
digikala.guideStep1: Login to your seller account at
digikala.guideStep2: Open Service Hub, then go to Exclusive Token.
digikala.guideStep3: Copy the token shown in the blue instruction box.
digikala.guideStep4: Paste the token here. Kalahamoon will detect whether it is an access token or authorization code.
digikala.pasteApiKey: Paste your Digikala seller token below.
digikala.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste Digikala token or authorization code...
digikala.linkedTo: Your Kalahamoon CRM is now linked to {name}.
digikala.nextStep1: Orders will be synced automatically to your CRM.
digikala.nextStep2: Products and inventory will be synchronized.
digikala.nextStep3: You can manage everything from one dashboard.

woocommerce.title: WooCommerce & Excel Import
woocommerce.description: Connect your WooCommerce store to sync products and orders, or import from Excel.
woocommerce.connectDescription: Connect WooCommerce or use Excel import on Products/Orders pages
woocommerce.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect WooCommerce?
woocommerce.credentialsRequired: Store URL, Consumer Key, and Consumer Secret are required.
woocommerce.setupDescription: Enter your WooCommerce REST API credentials. Find them under WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API.
woocommerce.credentialsDescription: Use a key with Read/Write permission for full sync.
woocommerce.loadFailedTitle: WooCommerce settings could not be loaded
woocommerce.excelImportDescription: Upload .xlsx or .xls files to import products or orders in bulk.
woocommerce.productsExcelColumns: Products: title/name, description, price, inventory/stock, sku, image URL, status.
woocommerce.ordersExcelColumns: Orders: order number, customer name, email, phone, total, currency, date, items.
woocommerce.apiCredentialsLine1: WooCommerce: WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API → Add key. Use Read/Write for sync.

automationDetail.title: Create Automation Rule
automationDetail.description: Define trigger, conditions, and actions for your new rule
automationDetail.confirmExecute: This will execute the rule immediately. Continue?
automationDetail.actionsRequiredError: At least one action is required
automationDetail.ruleDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this rule does
automationDetail.conditionsDescription: Optional additional conditions that must be met
automationDetail.actionsDescription: What should happen when conditions are met?
automationDetail.noTriggerConfig: No additional configuration needed for this trigger.
automationDetail.aiPromptPlaceholder: e.g., Analyze the sentiment of the last message and summarize it.
automationDetail.legacyRuleReadOnly: This legacy automation rule is read-only and can only be deactivated.
automationDetail.legacyRuleWarning: This rule uses unsupported legacy automation features. You can review it here, but only deactivation is allowed in this phase.
automationDetail.startFromTemplateDescription: Pick a ready-made recipe or build one from scratch below.
automationDetail.selectTriggerFirst: Select a trigger first to see compatible actions.
automationDetail.cronInvalid: Invalid cron expression — check the format.
automationDetail.cronEmptyHint: Enter a cron expression or pick an example below.

telegram.title: Telegram Integration
telegram.botConfigDescription: Enter your Telegram Bot API details below.
telegram.webhookUrlHint: The URL where Telegram will send incoming messages.
telegram.savedTokenPlaceholder: Saved token will be kept unless you replace it
telegram.savedTokenHint: A bot token is already saved. Leave this blank to keep the current token.
telegram.loadFailedTitle: Telegram settings could not be loaded
telegram.readOnlyDescription: Only organization owners and admins can update Telegram settings.
telegram.guideStep2: Create a new bot using /newbot command.
telegram.guideStep3: Copy the HTTP API Token provided and paste it in the form.

bale.title: Bale Integration
bale.botConfigDescription: Just paste your Bale bot token — the username and webhook are configured automatically.
bale.savedTokenPlaceholder: Saved token will be kept unless you replace it
bale.savedTokenHint: A bot token is already saved. Leave this blank to keep the current token.
bale.loadFailedTitle: Bale settings could not be loaded
bale.readOnlyDescription: Only organization owners and admins can update Bale settings.
bale.guideStep1: Open BotFather in Bale and create a new bot (or pick an existing one).
bale.guideStep2: Copy the “Access token” message BotFather sends you (like 433096094:AbC...).
bale.guideStep3: Paste the token in the box and click “Connect Bot” — everything else is automatic.
bale.botTokenHint: Get the token from BotFather in Bale (the “Access token” message). Keep it secret.
bale.webhookWarningTitle: Bot connected, but not receiving messages yet
bale.webhookWarningBody: The bot connected successfully, but Bale cannot deliver messages until the app runs on a public HTTPS domain. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL to your production domain and click Reconnect.

settings.whatsappConfigurationDescription: Enter your WhatsApp Business API credentials to enable messaging
settings.whatsappPhoneNumberIdHint: Your WhatsApp Business phone number ID from Meta
settings.whatsappAccessTokenHint: Permanent access token for your WhatsApp Business API
settings.whatsappAccessTokenSavedHint: An access token is already configured. Enter a new token only if you want to replace it.
settings.whatsappWebhookUrlHint: URL where WhatsApp will send message events
settings.whatsappWebhookVerifyTokenHint: Token used to verify webhook requests from WhatsApp
settings.whatsappConnectionFailed: WhatsApp connection failed. Please check your credentials.
settings.whatsappSetupGuideDescription: Follow these steps to connect your WhatsApp Business account
settings.whatsappStep1: Step 1: Create a Meta Business Account
settings.whatsappStep1Description:
1. Go to business.facebook.com
2. Create or sign in to your Meta Business Account
3. Add your business information
4. Verify your business (if required)
settings.whatsappStep2: Step 2: Set Up WhatsApp Business API
settings.whatsappStep2Description:
1. In Meta Business Suite, go to WhatsApp > API Setup
2. Create a new WhatsApp Business Account
3. Add a phone number (or use an existing one)
4. Complete the phone number verification process
settings.whatsappStep3Description:
1. Go to WhatsApp > API Setup in Meta Business Suite
2. Find your Phone Number ID (usually a long number)
3. Find your Business Account ID
4. Generate a Permanent Access Token:
   - Go to System Users in Business Settings
   - Create a system user with WhatsApp permissions
   - Generate a token with 'whatsapp_business_messaging' and 'whatsapp_business_management' permissions
settings.whatsappStep4Description:
1. Use the Webhook URL provided above (or your custom endpoint)
2. Create a verify token (any secure random string)
3. In Meta Business Suite, go to WhatsApp > Configuration > Webhooks
4. Enter your Webhook URL and Verify Token
5. Subscribe to 'messages' events
settings.whatsappStep5Description:
1. Fill in all the required fields above
2. Click 'Test Connection' to verify your credentials
3. If successful, click 'Save' to store your configuration
4. Your WhatsApp integration is now ready to use!
settings.whatsappSupportText: Visit the Meta Business Help Center or contact your system administrator for assistance.
settings.whatsappPhoneNumberIdDetailed: This is the unique identifier for your WhatsApp Business phone number. You can find it in Meta Business Suite under WhatsApp > API Setup. It's typically a 15-17 digit number.
settings.whatsappBusinessAccountIdDetailed: This is your WhatsApp Business Account ID. You can find it in Meta Business Suite under WhatsApp > API Setup. It's usually displayed near your phone number information.
settings.whatsappAccessTokenDetailed: This is a permanent access token that allows the application to send and receive messages via WhatsApp Business API. Generate it in Meta Business Suite under System Users. Make sure it has 'whatsapp_business_messaging' and 'whatsapp_business_management' permissions. Keep this token secure and never share it publicly.
settings.whatsappApiVersionDetailed: The version of the WhatsApp Business API you're using. The current recommended version is v18.0. You can check the latest version in Meta's API documentation. This field is usually pre-filled with the latest stable version.
settings.whatsappWebhookUrlDetailed: This is the URL where WhatsApp will send incoming message events. It should be a publicly accessible HTTPS endpoint. The webhook will receive notifications when messages are sent to or received from your WhatsApp Business number. Make sure this URL is accessible from the internet.
settings.whatsappWebhookVerifyTokenDetailed: A secure random string used to verify webhook requests from WhatsApp. When you configure your webhook in Meta Business Suite, WhatsApp will send a verification request with this token. Use a strong, random string (at least 32 characters) and keep it secure. This token must match what you enter in Meta Business Suite webhook configuration.
settings.whatsappMainDescription: Choose the WhatsApp integration method that best fits your needs. The Grey Route (Web.js) method is recommended for users in Iran.
settings.whatsappBusinessApiDescription: Official Meta WhatsApp Business API integration. Requires Meta Business account and verification.
settings.whatsappBusinessApiPro3: Access to all WhatsApp Business features
settings.whatsappBusinessApiCon2: May not work in restricted regions
settings.whatsappWebJsDescription: Direct WhatsApp Web connection using whatsapp-web.js library.
settings.whatsappWebJsPro3: Easy setup with QR code - just click Connect
settings.whatsappWebJsProxyTypeHint: Select your proxy type (Shadowsocks or VLESS)
settings.whatsappWebJsProxyTypeDetailed: Choose between Shadowsocks or VLESS proxy. Shadowsocks is more common, while VLESS is a newer protocol. Both work with WhatsApp Web.js.
settings.whatsappWebJsProxyUrlHint: Your proxy server URL (optional, e.g., socks5://proxy.example.com:1080)
settings.whatsappWebJsProxyUrlDetailed: Enter your proxy server URL (optional). Proxy can be used for privacy, stability, or to route traffic through a specific location. The proxy should support SOCKS5 or HTTP protocols. Example format: socks5://username:password@proxy.example.com:1080
settings.whatsappWebJsSessionNameHint: A unique name for this WhatsApp session
settings.whatsappWebJsSessionNameDetailed: A unique identifier for this WhatsApp session. This allows you to maintain multiple WhatsApp connections. The session data will be saved so you don't need to scan QR code again after the first connection.
settings.whatsappWebJsInfoDescription: This method connects directly to WhatsApp Web using the whatsapp-web.js library. The connection is established by scanning a QR code with your phone.
settings.whatsappWebJsQrCodeDescription: Scan this QR code with your WhatsApp mobile app to connect
settings.whatsappWebJsQrCodeInstructions: Open WhatsApp on your phone, go to Settings > Linked Devices > Link a Device, and scan this QR code.
settings.whatsappQuickStartStep3: Scan the QR code with WhatsApp
settings.whatsappQuickStartStep4: Wait for the session to connect
settings.whatsappSessionsDescription: You can manage multiple WhatsApp accounts here.
settings.whatsappQuickConnectDescription: You can connect directly. Just enter a Session Name and click "Connect" below.
settings.whatsappTestProxyHint: Enter a proxy URL to test
settings.whatsappDeleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the session "{name}"? This will disconnect it and delete all its settings.
settings.whatsappDeleteSessionNetworkFailed: Failed to remove session due to a network error.
settings.whatsappServerUnreachable: Cannot reach the server. Please ensure the main application is running.
settings.whatsappConnectionTimeout: Connection timeout: The bridge service took too long to respond. This may happen during WhatsApp initialization. Please try again.
settings.whatsappBridgeNotRunning: WhatsApp bridge service is not running. Please start it with: npm run wa-bridge:dev
settings.whatsappBridgeUnreachable: Cannot connect to the WhatsApp bridge service. Make sure it is running on http://localhost:3001. Start it with: npm run wa-bridge:dev
settings.whatsappConnectionAborted: Connection was aborted. This may happen if the request took too long. Please try again.
settings.whatsappRemoveConfigConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this WhatsApp configuration? This will disconnect the current session and delete all saved settings. You can add a new WhatsApp connection afterward.
settings.whatsappRemoveConfigSuccess: Configuration removed successfully. You can now add a new WhatsApp connection.
settings.whatsappEnterProxyFirst: Please enter a proxy URL first
settings.whatsappWebhookAutoNote: This URL is automatically configured. Use this exact URL when setting up your webhook in Meta Business Suite.
settings.whatsappDocumentationDescription: Complete documentation for both WhatsApp integration approaches
settings.whatsappBusinessApiDocsDescription: Official Meta WhatsApp Business API documentation and setup guide
settings.whatsappWebJsDocsDescription: WhatsApp Web.js (Grey Route) documentation and setup guide
settings.whatsappBusinessApiDocsOverview: The WhatsApp Business API is Meta's official solution for businesses to send and receive messages at scale. It provides enterprise-grade reliability and access to all WhatsApp Business features.
settings.whatsappBusinessApiDocsRequirement3: Permanent access token with required permissions
settings.whatsappBusinessApiDocsSetup:
1. Create a Meta Business Account at business.facebook.com
2. Set up WhatsApp Business API in Meta Business Suite
3. Get your Phone Number ID and Business Account ID
4. Generate a permanent access token
5. Configure webhook URL and verify token
6. Test the connection and save your configuration
settings.whatsappWebJsDocsOverview: WhatsApp Web.js is a library that connects to WhatsApp Web directly, similar to how WhatsApp Web works in browsers.
settings.whatsappWebJsDocsRequirement1: WhatsApp mobile app installed on your phone
settings.whatsappWebJsDocsSetup:
1. Enter a session name
2. Click Connect to generate QR code
3. Scan QR code with WhatsApp mobile app
4. Wait for connection to establish
5. Session will be saved for future use
settings.whatsappDocsAdditionalResourcesDescripti: External documentation and resources for WhatsApp integration
settings.whatsappWebJsDocsStep3: Scan the displayed QR code with your WhatsApp mobile app
settings.whatsappWebJsDocsStep4: Wait for the connection to establish - session will be saved automatically
settings.whatsappWebJsDocsStep5: Manage your sessions on the settings page
settings.whatsappWebJsConnectionError: Failed to connect. Please ensure the backend service is running.
settings.whatsappDocsBackendRequirementsDescripti: The following API endpoints need to be implemented in your backend for the WhatsApp integration to work properly.
settings.tabChannelsDescription: Customer messaging channels and marketplace conversations
settings.tabCommerceDescription: Storefronts, product sync, accounting, and commerce integrations
settings.tabAiWorkflowsDescription: AI setup, knowledge, and operational workflows
settings.tabMessagingDescription: Reusable replies, templates, broadcasts, and contact quality
settings.tabWorkspaceDescription: People, organization, billing, and account preferences
settings.tabDeveloperDescription: Webhooks, MCP servers, and technical integrations

automation.title: Automation Rules
automation.subtitle: Create and manage automated workflows for your sales pipeline
automation.noRulesDescription: Create your first automation rule to streamline your sales workflow
automation.noActiveRulesDescription: Activate an existing rule or create a new one
automation.noInactiveRulesDescription: All your rules are currently active
automation.aiEvaluationPlaceholder: e.g., Is the user interested in a catalog?
automation.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this rule? This action cannot be undone.
automation.noPermission: You don't have permission to view automation.
automation.planUsage: Plan usage: {usage}/{limit} active automation rules on {plan}.
automation.planLimitReached: You have reached your {plan} plan limit for active automation rules ({usage}/{limit}). Upgrade to {nextPlan} to add more.
automation.leadIdPlaceholder: Paste a lead ID to test against
automation.messageContentPlaceholder: Override last message for MESSAGE_CONTAINS conditions
automation.conditionsNotMetWouldSkip: Conditions NOT met — rule would be skipped

types.TIME_IN_STAGE_description: Trigger when lead has been in a stage for a duration
types.TIME_SINCE_ACTIVITY_description: Trigger when there has been no activity for a duration
types.LEAD_CREATED_description: Trigger when a new lead is created
types.LEAD_UPDATED_description: Trigger when lead data is updated
types.STAGE_CHANGED_description: Trigger when lead moves to a different stage
types.MESSAGE_RECEIVED_description: Trigger when an inbound message is received
types.MESSAGE_SENT_description: Trigger when an outbound message is sent
types.MESSAGE_CONTAINS_description: Trigger when message contains specific keywords
types.INVOICE_OVERDUE_description: Trigger when invoice payment is overdue
types.BASALAM_ORDER_CREATED_description: Trigger when a new order is received from Basalam
types.BASALAM_ORDER_STATUS_CHANGED_description: Trigger when a Basalam order status changes
types.BASALAM_MESSAGE_RECEIVED_description: Trigger when a message is received from Basalam
types.WOOCOMMERCE_ORDER_CREATED_description: Trigger when a new order is synced from WooCommerce
types.PRODUCT_LOW_STOCK_description: Trigger when product inventory falls below a threshold
types.BASALAM_PRODUCT_OUT_OF_STOCK_description: Trigger when a Basalam product goes out of stock
types.BASALAM_PRICE_CHANGED_description: Trigger when a Basalam product price changes significantly
types.DIGIKALA_ORDER_CREATED_description: Trigger when a new order is received from Digikala
types.DIGIKALA_ORDER_STATUS_CHANGED_descriptio: Trigger when a Digikala order status changes
types.DIGIKALA_STOCK_LOW_description: Trigger when Digikala product stock falls below threshold
types.DIGIKALA_COMPETITION_description: Trigger on buy box or price competition changes
types.ACCOUNTING_SYNC_COMPLETED_description: Trigger after a successful accounting sync operation
types.ACCOUNTING_SYNC_FAILED_description: Trigger when an accounting sync operation fails
types.ACCOUNTING_INVOICE_CREATED_description: Trigger after an accounting invoice is created or updated
types.ACCOUNTING_PAYMENT_RECORDED_description: Trigger after an accounting payment/receipt is recorded

actions.send_message_description: Send a WhatsApp message to the lead
actions.send_sms_description: Send an SMS message to the lead
actions.move_stage_description: Move the lead to a different pipeline stage
actions.assign_user_description: Assign the lead to a user
actions.mark_stale_description: Mark or unmark lead as stale
actions.create_note_description: Add an internal note to the lead
actions.add_to_campaign_description: Add lead to a marketing campaign
actions.webhook_description: Send data to an external webhook
actions.ai_task_description: Run a custom AI task with flexible output
actions.accounting_sync_customer_description: Sync the current lead as a customer/contact to connected accounting providers
actions.accounting_sync_product_description: Sync the current product/item to connected accounting providers
actions.accounting_create_invoice_description: Create or update an accounting invoice for the current order
actions.accounting_register_payment_description: Register a payment or receipt for the current order in connected accounting providers
